title: Constant values zero in sim while they should be non-zero unsigned numbers

features.name: package constant concatenation for wider constant
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a package constant with a constant literal to create a wider constant definition
features.snippet:
const word15_u_t C_NAN_BF16 = 15'h7FC0;
const word31_u_t c_nan = {C_NAN_BF16, 16'h0};

features.name: typedef explicit-width unsigned constant type
features.description: Code should include a typedef defining an explicit-width unsigned type used for constant definitions
features.snippet:
typedef logic [14:0] word15_u_t;
const word15_u_t C_NAN_BF16 = 15'h7FC0;
